overall.description: A cinematic drone shot through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night during heavy rain. The camera travels along an elevated neon-lit highway, passes giant holographic advertisements including an orange koi fish, then flies over a complex highway interchange revealing the city's multi-level infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated neon-lit highway in cyberpunk district

events.description: giant orange holographic koi fish advertisement becomes visible on the left side

agents.ego_description: flying forward along the elevated highway at high speed through heavy rain, approaching the city center

entered.detail: wet asphalt road surface with reflective neon lighting
continuous cyan-blue neon strips embedded along the road edges
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows and digital signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked elevated highway at night, illuminated by cyan neon lights. The camera moves forward through heavy rain toward a distant city skyline, while a massive orange holographic koi fish materializes on the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved elevated highway with holographic advertisements

events.description: pedestrians with glowing umbrellas appear walking on the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: curving along the elevated highway, passing the orange hologram and approaching the bend where the road turns

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians with glowing purple umbrellas walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive glowing orange holographic koi fish swimming in the air beside the highway
metal safety barrier along the edge of the elevated road

segments.scene_description: The camera curves along the highway, bringing the massive orange holographic koi fish prominently into view on the left. Pedestrians with glowing umbrellas walk along the right sidewalk as the road bends, revealing the highway guardrail and the cityscape shifting to the left.

events.description: camera moves over the highway edge and begins looking down at the complex interchange below
blue holographic jellyfish creature appears floating on the right side

agents.ego_description: flying over the edge of the elevated highway and descending to reveal the multi-level highway interchange below

entered.detail: complex multi-level highway junction with glowing traffic lines and reflective wet surfaces
large translucent blue holographic jellyfish-like creature with trailing tentacles

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the highway to an aerial perspective, descending over the edge to reveal a vast highway interchange below. The orange koi hologram recedes into the distance on the left while a blue holographic jellyfish materializes on the right, floating above the complex road network.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of multi-level highway interchange

events.description: camera slows and pans to survey the expansive highway interchange below
orange holographic koi fish reappears prominently on the left side

agents.ego_description: flying low over the highway interchange, panning to observe the traffic and infrastructure below

segments.scene_description: The camera glides over the intricate highway interchange, showcasing the glowing traffic lines and reflective wet roads below. The blue jellyfish hologram drifts away to the right while the orange koi hologram swings back into view on the left, creating a symmetrical framing of the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked elevated highway that eventually descends into a sweeping aerial view of a complex urban interchange. It begins by gliding forward through heavy rain under cyan neon lights, as a massive orange holographic koi fish materializes on the left against a distant skyline. As the camera curves along the road, the koi becomes more prominent while pedestrians with glowing umbrellas pass by on the right sidewalk. The perspective then shifts from the highway to a descending aerial view, where the orange koi recedes and a blue holographic jellyfish emerges on the right to float above the multi-level road network. Finally, the camera glides over the intricate interchange and its reflective wet surfaces, with the blue jellyfish drifting away as the orange koi swings back into view to symmetrically frame the glowing city landscape.
